tasks.title: Phase 1-10: Initial Build & Feature Enhancements
tasks.description: Initial creation of the dashboard, including GitHub/Vercel skills.

tasks.title: Phase 11-15: Daily News Module Implementation
tasks.description: Built the backend, frontend, and cron job for the automated news briefing.

tasks.title: Phase 16-21: Cascade Failure 1 (Frontend Patching)
tasks.description: A series of flawed frontend patches that failed to address the root backend bug.

tasks.title: Phase 22-23: Regression 1 (Responsiveness Loss)
tasks.description: A UI overhaul that accidentally removed all mobile responsive styles.

tasks.title: Phase 24-27: Cascade Failure 2 (Rebuild Flaw)
tasks.description: A full rebuild that still contained the latent backend bug, leading to repeated deployment failures.

tasks.title: Phase 28-29: Final Data Update (Pre-Analysis)
tasks.description: The last deployment before the true root cause was finally identified.

tasks.title: Phase 30-31: Definitive Backend Architectural Fix
tasks.description: The final, correct fix of the backend's data access logic, resolving all deployment issues.

tasks.title: Phase 32: Full System Purge and Rebuild
tasks.description: Initiating a definitive rebuild using the kilo CLI and a disciplined workflow.

tasks.title: Phase 33: Final Verified Deployment
tasks.description: The final deployment after successful local verification.
